response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified three distinct vocal performances: '百花繚乱', 'KONNANじゃないっ!', and 'Great Days'. 2. Extracted song metadata from on-screen text ('Music: ZENTA' for 'KONNANじゃないっ!', '作詞 エンドケイプ 作曲 菅野祐悟' for 'Great Days'). 3. Searched for official lyrics using original artists/composers as per instructions. 4. Compiled lyrics, handled escaping and formatting for JSON. 5. Mapped scenes chronologically based on performance start/end times.
response.global_summary: A video featuring Oozora Subaru performing three different songs: '百花繚乱', 'KONNANじゃないっ!', and 'Great Days' (the latter with guests Hoshimachi Suisei, Usada Pekora, Shirogane Noel, and Mori Calliope).

scenes.description: Oozora Subaru performs '百花繚乱' with backup dancers. The title '百花繚乱' appears on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
生を受けたその意味を辿る宿命(さだめ)ならば逃げるなど愚かいずれ滅ぶこの身体ならば共に死ぬまで憑依(つ)いてみせろその女(め)よここへ
たとえ舞い落ちる花の如くこの身、命、朽ち果てようと息の途絶えるその瞬間(とき)までは踊り続けよう
この体に流るる血はゆらりゆらり揺蕩う炎鮮やかにこの身を焦がし空へと翔べ
何も捨てぬその道を選ぶ誰でもない己の答えを幼き日の憂いを晴らすは今この時いざ決死の舞台へ参らん
たとえ奈落からも舞い上がる譲りはせぬ 我が花道をこの喉枯れるその時までは唄い続けよう
今瞳に映る全てくらりくらり我が舞に乗せこの世に凄艶なる姿刻んでゆこう
美しき月闇に咲き乱れる我が女(め)をしかと今宵脳裏に焼き付けよ
たとえ舞い落ちる花の如くこの身、命、朽ち果てようと息の途絶えるその瞬間(とき)までは踊り続けよう
この体に降り立つ女(め)とゆらり、共に、命削ろう艶やかに煌めき纏い空へと翔べ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Tracing the meaning of my life
If it's fate, running away is foolish
If this body will eventually perish
Then follow me until we die together, you woman
Come here
Even if I fall like dancing flowers
If this body and life rot away
Until the moment my breath stops
I will continue to dance
The blood flowing in this body
Is a flame swaying, swaying, wavering
Scorch this body brightly and fly into the sky
I won't throw anything away, I choose this path
My own answer, no one else's
Clearing the melancholy of my childhood is now, at this time
Let's go to the desperate stage
Even if I soar up from the abyss
I will not yield, my flower path
Until the moment this throat runs dry
I will continue to sing
Everything reflected in my eyes now
Is swaying, swaying, on my dance
I will carve a gorgeous figure into this world
Beautiful moon, blooming wildly in the darkness
Burn my woman, firmly into your mind tonight
Even if I fall like dancing flowers
If this body and life rot away
Until the moment my breath stops
I will continue to dance
With the woman who lands in this body
Swaying, together, let's whittle away our lives
Wrapped in gorgeous radiance, fly into the sky

scenes.description: Oozora Subaru performs 'KONNANじゃないっ!' with backup dancers. Music credit 'ZENTA' appears.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
アノユメも アコガレも
落書きのままボヤけて 消えろ寸前
「コレガイイノ?」「コレデイイノ?」
ふてくされてる鏡に 何度も問いかけた
泣きたい日も くじけそうな日も 乗り越えよう
希望を浴びなきゃ 夢というツボミは 開かないから
Are you ready GO! 走り出そう! 取り急ぎ さぁスタート!
うつむかない!ふりむかない! 明日は絶対もっとShiny!
ジブン次第!掴め未来!
今すぐスタートボタン 押してみよう
私は こんなんじゃないはず!
Made in 言い訳の
過保護な保守的バリアー 突き破って
「コレガイイヨ」「コレデイイヨ」
耳元囁く悪魔に アッカンベーしてやろうよ
たとえ何滴 流した涙が 空回っても
今日手を抜いたら 憧れは明日も 憧れのままじゃん
あきらめも言い訳も 取りまとめリスタート!
『たられば』にすがるには まだまだ若すぎじゃない?
七転び八起きでGO!
何度もリセットボタン
どんな夢も きっと 困難じゃないはず
信じてみよう
私は こんなんじゃないはず!
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Those dreams, that admiration
Blurring while still just graffiti, on the verge of disappearing
Is this okay? Is this really okay?
I questioned my mirror, sulking again and again
Even on days I want to cry, even on days I feel like giving up, let's overcome it
Unless I bathe in hope, the flower bud of my dream won't open
Are you ready GO! Let's start running! In a hurry, start now!
Don't look down! Don't look back! Tomorrow will definitely be even more Shiny!
It's up to me! Seize the future!
Let's press the start button right now
I am, this can't be all there is!
Made in excuses
Break through the overprotective, conservative barrier
Is this good? Is this really good?
Let's stick out our tongues at the devil whispering in our ears
Even if I shed drops of tears and spin in circles
If I slack off today, my longing will remain just a longing tomorrow
Let's bundle up my resignation and excuses and restart!
Are you still too young to cling to 'if onlys'?
Fall seven times, rise eight, GO!
How many times have I pressed the reset button?
Surely, any dream won't be difficult
Believe in it
I am, this can't be all there is!

scenes.description: Oozora Subaru, Hoshimachi Suisei, Usada Pekora, Shirogane Noel, and Mori Calliope perform 'Great Days'.
scenes.performer_in_video: Oozora Subaru, Hoshimachi Suisei, Usada Pekora, Shirogane Noel, Mori Calliope
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Shining justice 芽生えてく
Brand new bed town 交差する息吹
岬から潮風 トンネル抜け鉄塔へ
引かれ合い小道に迷い込む
ココロに溶け込む影
照らす黄金の“Sprits”
それは守り抜く光
Let the voice of love take you higher
集まるチカラで時さえ越えて
1999 Bizarre Summer
巡る勇気で生きる町
Great Days
[FULL VERSION]
Song of praises 響かせ
Brand new up town すれ違う景色
雲の切れ間に射す光がほら降り注ぎ イニシエの小道へ誘い込む
煌めき導く町 たぎる黄金の“Sprits”それは果てしない絆
Let the joy of love give you an answer
別れの時さえ砕けぬ意思で
1999年 Bizarre Summer
自分乗り越え掴み取れ未来
Let the voice of love take you higher
集まるチカラで時さえ越えて
Let the joy of love give you an answer
別れの時さえ砕けぬ意思で
1999年 Bizarre Summer
交わす勇気が生む讃歌
Great Days!
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Shining justice, starts to bloom
Brand new bed town, a fresh breath arrives
A sea breeze emerges from that tunnel, heading for that tower
We're drawn to one another, losing our way down narrow lanes
A shadow melts into our hearts
As we head for a golden spirit soul
That will light the way
A light to protect our only one
Let the voice of love take you higher!
With this gathered power, go beyond even time
1999 bizarre summer
This city thrives on revolving courage
Great Days
Song of praises, let it resonate
Brand new up town, crossing sceneries
Light peeks through between clouds and shines down on the path of destiny
They sparkle and lead to the town, golden spirit
That's an infinite bond
Let the joy of love give you an answer
The will so strong that it won't be broken when we go separate ways
1999 bizarre summer
Go over yourself and grab a future
Let the voice of love take you higher
We gather our power, go beyond even time
Let the joy of love give you an answer
The will so strong that it won't be broken when we go separate ways
1999 bizarre summer
Exchanging our courage creates a requiem
Great Days!
